source.description: Six-panel generated raster marker contact sheet reviewed before cropping; final panel saved as the finished master.
source.notes: Contact-sheet-first workflow, no labels, numbers, arrows, or embedded text.

process_strategy: The fry carton stays centered at one scale while carton, fries, rim, panel folds, salt marks, fill colors, and shadow appear before the final marker cleanup.

final_elements.name: trapezoid carton guide and fry stick guides
final_elements.description: A simple fry carton shape with vertical fry stick guides rising from it.

final_elements.name: bold carton and individual fry silhouettes
final_elements.description: A rounded red carton outline with separate rectangular fries.

final_elements.name: top rim, side panels, and fold seams
final_elements.description: Carton rim and side panel divisions that make the container dimensional.

final_elements.name: thicker outline, fry tips, and small salt marks
final_elements.description: More confident black outline, visible fry ends, and a few tiny salt marks on existing fries.

final_elements.name: red carton fill, yellow fry fill, highlight gaps, and shadow
final_elements.description: Marker color applied to the already drawn carton and fries, with reserved highlights and a soft base shadow.

frames.visible_job: Places the carton guide and fry stick guides.
introduces: trapezoid carton guide and fry stick guides

frames.visible_job: Turns the guides into a clear carton and individual fries.
introduces: bold carton and individual fry silhouettes
requires_prior_elements: trapezoid carton guide and fry stick guides

frames.visible_job: Adds the carton rim, side panels, and fold seams.
introduces: top rim, side panels, and fold seams
requires_prior_elements: bold carton and individual fry silhouettes

frames.visible_job: Thickens existing contours and adds fry tips plus salt marks to existing fries.
introduces: thicker outline, fry tips, and small salt marks
requires_prior_elements: bold carton and individual fry silhouettes
top rim, side panels, and fold seams

frames.visible_job: Adds red and yellow marker fills, highlight gaps, and a soft shadow to existing shapes.
introduces: red carton fill, yellow fry fill, highlight gaps, and shadow
requires_prior_elements: bold carton and individual fry silhouettes
top rim, side panels, and fold seams
thicker outline, fry tips, and small salt marks

final_step.visible_job: Thickens existing outlines and deepens the existing red carton, yellow fries, highlights, salt marks, and shadow.
allowed_changes: deeper red and yellow marker passes
clarification of existing rim, folds, fry tips, salt marks, highlight gaps, and shadow

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may darken, ink, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
